name_cn:
BOULOGNE Handbag #️⃣M45831
Exclusive global launch! This model is custom-made according to Chanel's French production specifications with dynamic chip re-coding, original factory exclusive fabric, and original factory exclusive light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic items)
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure 100% restoration of the authentic feel! Exclusive original factory fabric, hardware, edge varnish, stitching + authentic craftsmanship + official website's latest complete gift box!
29 x 16 x 9.5 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Fabric lining
Metal hardware
Leather corners
Interior slip pocket
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 31.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 50.0 cm
Chain: Removable
Chain half-length: 25.0 cm
Made in France
